2026-07-14T00:17:39.0381944Z ##[group]Run # Create a temporary file
2026-07-14T00:17:39.0382378Z [36;1m# Create a temporary file[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.0382656Z [36;1mtouch /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.0382910Z [36;1m[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.0383163Z [36;1m# Add the opening of the asciiart definition[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.0383546Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciiart =' > /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.0383873Z [36;1m[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.0384094Z [36;1m# Decode base64 ASCII art to a file[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.1249827Z [36;1mecho "" | base64 -d > /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2118779Z [36;1m[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2119129Z [36;1m# Process each line of the input ASCII art and format it properly[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2119529Z [36;1mwhile IFS= read -r line; do[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2119811Z [36;1m  # Escape backslashes[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2120117Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$line" | sed 's/\\/\\\\/g')[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2120443Z [36;1m  # Escape any double quotes[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2120781Z [36;1m  escaped_line=$(echo "$escaped_line" | sed 's/"/\\"/g')[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2121638Z [36;1m  # Add the line with proper C string formatting[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2122046Z [36;1m  echo '"'"$escaped_line"'\n"' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2122394Z [36;1mdone < /tmp/ascii_input.txt[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2122653Z [36;1m[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2122879Z [36;1m# Add the closing part with VERSION[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2123345Z [36;1mecho '"             Free60.org XeLL - Xenon Linux Loader " VERSION "\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2123767Z [36;1m[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2123971Z [36;1m# Add the asciitail part[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2124417Z [36;1mecho 'static char* asciitail =' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2125139Z [36;1mecho '"    Special Corona & Winchester Compatible XeLL version\n\n";' >> /tmp/new_asciiart.h[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2125706Z [36;1m[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2125920Z [36;1m# Ensure CP437 encoding[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2126471Z [36;1miconv -f UTF-8 -t CP437 /tmp/new_asciiart.h > /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h || cp /tmp/new_asciiart.h /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2127192Z [36;1m[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2127405Z [36;1m# Replace the original file[0m
2026-07-14T00:17:39.2127733Z [36;1mcp /tmp/new_asciiart_cp437.h source/lv2/asciiart.h[0m
